name: My Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 2 cups of berries.
2. In a saucepan, combine the sugar and cornstarch.
3. Slowly add water to the mixture until it is smooth.
4. Add the chopped strawberries to the saucepan.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
6. Allow the mixture to cool in the refrigerator for about half an hour.
7. Pour approximately 3/4 of the cooled mixture into the prepared pie crust.
8. Stand up whole strawberries in syrup (to fill the crust).
9. Pour the remaining syrup over the strawberries.
10. Chill until firm for about three hours.
11. Spread Cool Whip Lite® evenly over the top of the pie and serve.
